summary: Park Joonwoo, accompanied by two Black Skull Guild executives (Shawn and Gain), confronts Kang Hyunwoo, accusing him of purposely deleting his character ID. Joonwoo challenges Hyunwoo to a 'Winner-Takes-All, Character Deletion Bet' Captain Battle, despite Hyunwoo being significantly lower level than the executives. Hyunwoo surprisingly defeats both Shawn and Gain with ease, showcasing superior skill and control over higher-level opponents. As the last remaining participant, Park Joonwoo enters a 'Berserk' state due to extreme anxiety before his own duel.
key_moments: Park Joonwoo confronts Kang Hyunwoo with guild executives Shawn and Gain, demanding an apology and threatening to report him.
Hyunwoo accepts Joonwoo's challenge to a 'Winner-Takes-All, Character Deletion Bet' Captain Battle.
Kang Hyunwoo (Level 20) skillfully defeats both Level 60+ executives, Shawn and Gain, in one-sided duels.
Under extreme pressure and anxiety, Park Joonwoo enters a 'Berserk' state before his turn to duel against Hyunwoo.
